User Story: As a parent on iPad, I want to download and import the add-on so my child can play.
Expected Behaviour: Safari download opens in Minecraft; both RP and BP import; no duplicate error on update.
Edge Cases: Old pack versions; Minecraft <1.21; storage full; duplicate pack message.
Test Cases: T-001-01: dist/brindal-grayson-cow-pack.mcaddon exists after build | T-001-02: MCADDON size under 1.5 MB | T-001-03: Safari tap-to-import on physical iPad
Notes: Manual import requires physical iPad. | 1 manual test(s) waived

User Story: As a user with experiment issues, I want textures without scripts.
Expected Behaviour: mcpack contains RP only; cow-hide textures apply; no Cow Barn scripts.
Edge Cases: Beta APIs off; HCF off; partial pack activation.
Test Cases: T-002-01: dist/brindal-grayson-cow-pack.mcpack exists | T-002-02: mcpack is RP-only (no behavior pack)

User Story: As a player, I need HCF and Beta APIs ON in a new world for full features.
Expected Behaviour: New world with both experiments enables scripts, custom entities, and items.
Edge Cases: Existing worlds cannot add experiments; HCF-only or Beta-only partial modes.
Test Cases: T-003-01: BP manifest mentions Beta APIs | T-003-02: Experiment matrix row 1 full QA (device) | T-003-03: Experiment matrix rows 2-4 degraded modes (device)
Notes: Degraded modes are expected, not defects. | 3 manual test(s) waived

User Story: As a player, I activate both resource and behavior packs in world settings.
Expected Behaviour: Both packs listed; checkerboard textures if only one active.
Test Cases: T-004-01: BP depends on RP UUID d36a0504-...

User Story: As a new player, I see welcome messages and understand Ranch Bell + Feed Bag.
Expected Behaviour: initialSpawn triggers welcomePlayer: title, chat tips, starter cow deployed.
Edge Cases: Spectator mode; script not ready shows Beta hint.
Test Cases: T-010-01: Script contains welcomePlayer and playerSpawn handler | T-010-02: First join flow on device
Notes: Beta APIs ON; script module loaded | 1 manual test(s) waived

User Story: As a new player, I receive Ranch Bell, Feed Bag, cookies, and spawn eggs.
Expected Behaviour: giveStarterKit adds bgcow:ranch_bell, feed_bag x16, cookies, cow/spot/storm eggs.
Edge Cases: Full inventory; optional spawn egg IDs fail silently.
Test Cases: T-011-01: Script references all starter item IDs

User Story: As a new player, wild cows spawn nearby so I can catch immediately.
Expected Behaviour: ensureNearbyCows spawns up to 2 wild vanilla cows if count low.
Edge Cases: No solid ground; entity spawn cap; dimension errors.

User Story: As a returning player, my herd and catalog are saved.
Expected Behaviour: bgcow:barn_v1 dynamic property stores JSON; loadBarn/saveBarn round-trip.
Edge Cases: Corrupt JSON resets to defaultBarn; missing fields migrated.
Test Cases: T-013-01: Script has BARN_KEY and loadBarn/saveBarn | T-013-02: hunger_persisted simulation

User Story: As a returning player, my deployed cow is restored or cleared if missing.
Expected Behaviour: reconcileDeployed matches deployedEntityId or clearDeployed.

User Story: As a player without Beta APIs, I see a helpful message.
Expected Behaviour: playerSpawn when !scriptReady shows BETA_APIS_HINT.

User Story: As a player, I tap Ranch Bell to open the Cow Barn menu.
Expected Behaviour: ActionFormData with Deploy, Feed, Breed, Recall, My herd buttons.
Edge Cases: UI module failure falls back to bell cycle.
Test Cases: T-020-01: showBarnMenu in script | T-020-02: Menu opens on device

User Story: As a player, if menu fails, bell cycles deploy→feed→breed→recall.
Expected Behaviour: onBellTapCycle executes mode then advances bellMode.

User Story: As a player, I deploy my active cow as a world entity.
Expected Behaviour: deployActive recalls prior, spawnCowEntity at safe ground, applies visuals.
Edge Cases: HCF off falls back to vanilla cow with hint; spawn blocked.
Test Cases: T-022-01: deployed_vanilla_catch_trap simulation | T-022-02: entity_type_mapping simulation

User Story: As a player, I feed my active cow from the barn menu.
Expected Behaviour: hunger +28, mood +12, capped at 100; calf feedsToAdult decrements.
Test Cases: T-023-01: calf_feeds_to_adult simulation | T-023-02: hunger_persisted simulation

User Story: As a player, I breed two ready adults from the menu.
Expected Behaviour: tryBreed: Yard+ rank, 2 adults hunger≥40 mood≥55, not on cooldown, not full.
Edge Cases: Pen rank blocked; cooldown; barn full at legend 30.
Test Cases: T-024-01: new_player_catch_to_breed simulation | T-024-02: breed_cooldown_blocks simulation | T-024-03: adults_not_ready_blocks_breed simulation | T-024-04: barn_full_blocks_catch simulation

User Story: As a player, I recall deployed cow and cycle to next in herd.
Expected Behaviour: recallActive removes entity, cycleActiveCow advances activeId.

User Story: As a player, I pick any cow from a list to make it active.
Expected Behaviour: showHerdPicker lists up to 15 cows; selection sets activeId.

User Story: As a player, I use Feed Bag near a wild cow to add it to my barn.
Expected Behaviour: findWildCow within 5 blocks; traitsFromWildEntity; rank-up message.
Edge Cases: No wild cow; barn full; entity remove fails.
Test Cases: T-030-01: new_player_catch_to_breed simulation | T-030-02: barn_full_blocks_catch simulation

User Story: As a player, I feed my active cow when no wild cow is nearby.
Expected Behaviour: feedCow on active; status message with hunger/mood.
Edge Cases: No active cow prompts catch or deploy.
Test Cases: T-031-01: deployed_vanilla_catch_trap feeds when no wild

User Story: As a player, my own deployed cow is never caught by Feed Bag.
Expected Behaviour: findWildCow excludes deployedEntities id.

User Story: As a returning player, renamed bell/wheat items still work.
Expected Behaviour: isRanchBell/isFeedBag accept minecraft:bell+wheat with nameTag.

User Story: As a player, my barn rank grows with herd size unlocking slots.
Expected Behaviour: Pen(3)→Yard(6)→Ranch(10)→Spread(18)→Legend(30) slots.
Test Cases: T-040-01: rank_progression simulation | T-040-02: max_slots_per_rank simulation

User Story: As a collector, I fill a 15-slot trait catalog.
Expected Behaviour: registerCatalog adds coat/horns/size/mark keys; max 15 slots.

User Story: As a player, new traits grant Minecraft items.
Expected Behaviour: TRAIT_DISCOVERY_LOOT maps keys to gold/emerald/diamond/etc.

User Story: As a player, calves inherit parent traits.
Expected Behaviour: inheritTrait 50/50 parent pick; 14% mutate.
Edge Cases: Happy bonus 25% coat mutate when parents mood>80.

User Story: As a player, rare traits appear at higher ranks.
Expected Behaviour: shine coat at spread/legend; storm/gold horns/diamond mark/chunk size.
Test Cases: T-044-01: mutateTrait rank gating in script

User Story: As a player, I feed calves until they become adults.
Expected Behaviour: feedsToAdult starts at 3; decrements on feed; 0 = adult.
Test Cases: T-045-01: calf_growth simulation | T-045-02: calf_feeds_to_adult simulation

User Story: As a player, I wait 90 ticks (~4.5s) between breeds.
Expected Behaviour: breedCooldown set to 90; decrements each interval.
Edge Cases: Attempt breed during cooldown shows timer.

User Story: As a player, both parents need hunger≥40 and mood≥55.
Expected Behaviour: adultsReady filters feedsToAdult=0 cows meeting thresholds.

User Story: As a player, I cannot exceed rank slot cap.
Expected Behaviour: catch and breed check barn.cows.length >= maxSlots.

User Story: As a new player, I can reach 3+ cows in normal play.
Expected Behaviour: 40 random actions simulation reaches breed-ready herd.

User Story: As a player, cows need ongoing care.
Expected Behaviour: Every 200 ticks: hunger-1; mood-2 if hunger<35.

User Story: As a player, starving deployed cows return to barn safely.
Expected Behaviour: hunger<15 + deployed + active → recallDeployed.

User Story: As a player, I get action bar reminders when cows are hungry.
Expected Behaviour: uiStale after 6 intervals shows feed hint.
Test Cases: T-052-01: showBarnStatus hunger branch in script

User Story: As a player, I see title and chat when barn ranks up.
Expected Behaviour: maybeRankUpMessage on catch; yard unlocks breed tip.

User Story: As a parent, I read help text in chat.
Expected Behaviour: Lists bell, feed bag, recall, /barn, /next.

User Story: As a parent, I view herd summary in chat.
Expected Behaviour: Rank, slots, catalog, up to 8 cows listed.

User Story: As a parent, I trigger breed from chat.
Expected Behaviour: Calls tryBreed with same gates as menu.

User Story: As a parent, I switch active cow from chat.
Expected Behaviour: recallDeployed + cycleActiveCow.

User Story: As a player, spot coat deploys bgcow:brindal_cow entity.
Expected Behaviour: entityTypeForCow spot → SPOT_COW; HCF required.
Test Cases: T-070-01: entity_type_mapping simulation | T-070-02: Custom cow BP/RP files present

User Story: As a player, storm/shine coat deploys bgcow:grayson_cow.
Expected Behaviour: storm and shine map to STORM_COW.

User Story: As a player, I see trait labels, scale, and particles on cows.
Expected Behaviour: cowLabel nameTag; scale 0.78/1.0/1.32; gold/star/diamond/shine particles.
Edge Cases: Scale API unavailable on old engines.

User Story: As a player without HCF, I still get a vanilla cow.
Expected Behaviour: trySpawnEntity falls back to minecraft:cow with hint.

User Story: As a maintainer, I build the pack from source.
Expected Behaviour: ./scripts/build-mcaddon.sh completes; dist artifacts created.
Edge Cases: Missing vanilla_src clone; Venice key optional.

User Story: As a maintainer, validate_pack.py passes on built pack.
Expected Behaviour: Manifests, textures, script markers, JSON, size limits.

User Story: As a maintainer, pack meets cooperative marketplace rules.
Expected Behaviour: No JSON UI overrides; Beta APIs in description; custom items.

User Story: As a maintainer, shipped mobs are approved in mob-index.
Expected Behaviour: brindal_cow and grayson_cow approved.

User Story: As a maintainer, world template files are complete.
Expected Behaviour: manifest, lang, level_settings, checklist present.

User Story: As a maintainer, offline barn logic mirrors main.js.
Expected Behaviour: 17 scenarios in simulate_barn.py all pass.
Edge Cases: Python sim may drift from JS.

User Story: As a player, title screen shows Chaos Barn subtitle.
Expected Behaviour: menu.moo_world_subtitle mentions Ranch Bell.

User Story: As a player, Ranch Bell and Feed Bag have icons and names.
Expected Behaviour: items/*.json + item_texture.json + lang keys.

User Story: As Minecraft, I resolve pack dependencies.
Expected Behaviour: RP UUID d36a0504-...; BP depends on RP.

User Story: As a player, each cow gets a unique cow_N id.
Expected Behaviour: nextCowId increments; reload preserves counter.

User Story: As a maintainer, Venice keys are not committed.
Expected Behaviour: check_secrets.py blocks API keys.

User Story: As a player, the title screen plays custom menu music.
Expected Behaviour: Bell_At_Twilight.ogg applied via apply_audio_overrides; optimized in build.
Test Cases: T-091-01: Menu music OGG present in built RP

User Story: As a maintainer, PRs run build and validation automatically.
Expected Behaviour: ci.yml builds pack, runs .auto/checks.sh, uploads artifacts.
Test Cases: T-092-01: ci.yml exists with checks.sh step | T-092-02: CI build on merge (GitHub)

User Story: As a maintainer, merge to main bumps version and publishes release.
Expected Behaviour: publish.yml tags Charles' World of Chaos release with mcaddon/mcpack.
Notes: Keeps brindal-grayson-cow-pack.mcaddon filename for URL stability

User Story: As a player, pack name matches Charles' World of Chaos everywhere shipped.
Expected Behaviour: Built RP lang, BP manifest, README use Charles' World of Chaos.
Edge Cases: Legacy Brindal & Grayson names in source dirs and repo slug.
Test Cases: T-094-01: validate_branding.py passes on built pack
Notes: Repo slug still brindal-grayson-cow-pack — rename recommended

User Story: As a player, Spot and Storm cows can spawn naturally in worlds.
Expected Behaviour: brindal_cow.json and grayson_cow.json spawn rules merged into BP.
Test Cases: T-095-01: validate_pack reports 2+ custom spawn rules

User Story: As a maintainer, I review mob textures in a browser gallery.
Expected Behaviour: docs/mob-index/index.html lists shipped mobs with approval status.
Test Cases: T-096-01: mob-index.json exists with shipped mobs

User Story: As a Marketplace buyer, I get Brindal & Grayson Cow Ranch world template.
Expected Behaviour: worlds/brindal_grayson_ranch scaffold with locked experiments.
Edge Cases: Binary .mcworld export not in repo; naming differs from add-on brand.
Test Cases: T-097-01: validate_world_scaffold.py passes | T-097-02: World template export on device
Notes: Marketplace SKU name may stay Brindal & Grayson Cow Ranch | 1 manual test(s) waived
